notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte walks. Jose Fernandez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo singles on a ground ball to right fielder Adolis García. Jose Fernandez scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper grounds into a double play, second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Bryce Harper out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado singles on a fly ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Nolan Arenado to 2nd. Nolan Arenado advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Brandon Marsh.
